events.title: Q4 Kickoff
events.notes: Kick off Q4 strategy session with full team. Review targets and assign ownership.

events.title: New Arrivals Campaign
events.notes: Launch new fall arrivals campaign on TikTok Shop. Focus on boosting GMV with creator-driven content.

events.title: Jelly Roll Boot Launch
events.notes: Official launch of the Jelly Roll collab boot. Coordinate creator seeding and TT Live.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: Monthly sync to review performance, align on priorities, and update the strategy levers.

events.title: TikTok Shop Super Sale
events.notes: TikTok platform-wide super sale event. Increase ad spend and boost creator incentives.

events.title: Slip Camp Release
events.notes: New slip-on camp moc style release. Bundle with sample seeding to key affiliates.

events.title: Creator Review
events.notes: Quarterly review of creator performance. Identify top affiliates for Q4 push.

events.title: Holiday Push
events.notes: Holiday season campaign kickoff. Prep creatives, finalize creator list, set up TT ads.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: November planning sync. Review October performance and confirm holiday campaign readiness.

events.title: Buffalo Plaid Contest
events.notes: UGC contest around the buffalo plaid collection. Incentivize creators with gift cards and increased commission.

events.title: Black Friday Mega Deal
events.notes: Black Friday TikTok Shop mega sale. Maximize ad spend efficiency and push top SKUs.

events.title: Cyber Monday Promo
events.notes: Cyber Monday deals extension. Activate flash coupons and creator live streams.

events.title: Creator Review
events.notes: End-of-year creator audit. Identify top performers and plan retention strategy.

events.title: Holiday Gift Guide Launch
events.notes: Push HEYDUDE as holiday gift option. Coordinate with creators on gift guide content.

events.title: Monthly Planning Meeting
events.notes: December strategy sync. Final Q4 push review and Q1 2026 planning kickoff.

events.title: 12.12 TikTok Super Sale
events.notes: Annual 12.12 TikTok platform sale event. Double-down on top affiliate deals.

events.title: New Arrivals Campaign
events.notes: Late holiday new arrivals drop. Target gifting audience with fast shipping messaging.

events.title: Winter Clearance Campaign
events.notes: End of season clearance push. Clear excess inventory through TikTok Shop flash deals.

events.title: Year-End Review
events.notes: Full year performance review. Document learnings, celebrate wins, set targets for 2026.

events.title: New Year Teaser Launch
events.notes: Tease new 2026 spring collection via TikTok Live. Seed to select creators for early buzz.
